data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Amazon ensures user privacy and data protection through comprehensive encryption methods.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 and AES-256 encryption standards in use.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: MFA is enforced for user account access to enhance security.
data.technical_spec: Support for TOTP protocol and hardware tokens.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems
data.description: An advanced IDS is in place to detect and react to security threats.
data.technical_spec: AWS GuardDuty and custom IDS solutions monitor activities.

data.title: Data Leakage Prevention
data.description: Strategies are deployed to prevent accidental or malicious data leakage.
data.technical_spec: AWS Macie for sensitive data discovery and protection.

data.title: User Rights Management
data.description: Strict control over access rights is maintained to enforce security policies.
data.technical_spec: AWS IAM manages detailed access permissions.
